EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, MARK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 480 ELLIS STREET, #359, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, MARK DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
